title: EKV v2.6 Parameter Extraction Tutorial
author: Wladek Grabinski
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
OUTLINE  

 
	 Developments of the Compact Models 
	 EKV v2.6 MOSFET Model
	 
		 Modeled Effects 
		 Model Structure 
		 Parameter set 
	 
	 
	 Parameter Extraction Methodology
	 
		 Specific Current Extraction 
		 Pinch-off Voltage Characteristic 
		 Reverse Short Channel Effect (RSCE) 
		 Mobility Model 
		 Velocity Saturation 
		 Channel-Length Modulation (CLM) 
		 Impact Ionization Current 
	 
	 
	 Extraction Example: 0.18um CMOS 
	 EKV3: Extended Deep Submicron Model 
	 Summary 
	 Appendix 
	 References
